arts.ttl: “I love his intensity” - Flick full of praise for Raphinha
arts.sum: Flick was asked about Raphinha’s form in a press conference on Saturday and refused to take the credit for the player’s transformation, instead choosing to praise the team as a whole for helping Raphinha bring his best to the pitch. Raphinha’s Player of the Month Award for August is perhaps the most satisfying of all given how much the Brazilian was criticized in his first two seasons and the complete transformation he has gone through under Flick’s leadership.

arts.ttl: Van de Beek breaks silence on Man Utd nightmare
arts.sum: Donny van de Beek has revealed that he is trying to 'enjoy' playing football again after leaving Manchester United . Now, the Dutchman has opened up on his unsuccessful time at Man Utd and, though he refused to be drawn into criticising his former club, he did say that he is trying to enjoy his football again.

arts.ttl: Two Barcelona summer signings trained with Hansi Flick’s squad for the first time this weekend
arts.sum: A pair of summer signings at La Liga giants Barcelona played their respective parts in first-team training on Saturday. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point towards Abdul Aziz Issah…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick confirms injured Barcelona star ‘could return’ against Monaco
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has on Saturday confirmed the imminent return to action of a sidelined member of his squad. The player in question? Ansu Fati. Wide-man Ansu was…

arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid and Barcelona to battle for Euro 2024 winner
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Barcelona are both interested in signing central midfielder Fabian Ruiz, who played a starring role for Spain at Euro 2024, reports in Spain have claimed. Spanish publication SPORT report that Fabian, who has three years remaining on his PSG contract, is of interest to Real Madrid, despite the abundance of midfield riches already at Carlo Ancelotti's disposal.

Barcelona will be aiming to extend their winning run at the start of the 2024/25 season when they visit Girona in a Catalan derby on Sunday afternoon. GK: Marc-Andre ter Stegen - Even in Barca's 7-0 hammering of Real Valladolid before the international break, Ter Stegen needed to make a big save in the first half to secure a first clean sheet of the season.

arts.ttl: ‘Reminds me of Bernardo’ - Barca Atletic told what to expect from Aziz
arts.sum: Ghanaian scout Vinyl Tong has been talking about the new signing and has told Barcelona fans want they can expect from their new boy. He uses his speed, ball control and technique to create chances and help the team get over lines.

arts.ttl: Barcelona sensation to be included in squad vs Girona after Barca Atlètic absence
arts.sum: One of the most highly-regarded academy products on the books of La Liga giants Barcelona is expected to be afforded a call-up to the club’s first-team squad this weekend. That’s…

arts.ttl: Team News: Girona vs. Barcelona injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's La Liga clash between Girona and Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Donny van de Beek 'trying to enjoy himself again' after Man Utd troubles
arts.sum: Donny van de Beek says he's trying to enjoy playing football once again after ending a difficult four-year spell at Manchester United this summer. Speaking to ESPN Netherlands, the central midfielder admits he's simply trying to enjoy football again, yet he doesn't have a bad word to say about his time in England.
